chunks.en: Today I want to talk about arriving at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は職場に着くことについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually get there at nine in the morning.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい朝9時にそこに着きます。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is turn on my computer.
chunks.ja: 私が最初にすることはパソコンをつけることです。

chunks.en: After that I check my email and my chat.
chunks.ja: その後、メールとチャットを確認します。

chunks.en: I always say hello to my team members.
chunks.ja: 私はいつもチームのメンバーに挨拶します。

chunks.en: In the morning I often feel a little sleepy.
chunks.ja: 朝、私はよく少し眠く感じます。

chunks.en: But a cup of coffee helps me wake up.
chunks.ja: でも一杯のコーヒーが目を覚ますのに役立ちます。

chunks.en: So that's how I start my day at work.
chunks.ja: それが私の職場での一日の始め方です。

outline: Opening: talk about arriving at work
Point 1: arrival time and first tasks
Point 2: greeting the team and morning mood
Wrap-up: how I start my day

modelTalk.text: I get to work at about nine o'clock. Sometimes I'm a little early. First I sit down at my desk. I turn on my computer and wait. Then I put my bag down and get some water. I say hello to my friend Maria. She sits next to me. I say hi to my boss too. He's always kind in the morning. I feel a bit sleepy at first. But I drink my coffee and feel better. I like the quiet morning time. It's calm before the busy day starts. I check my email and read my messages. Then I'm ready to work. That's my morning at work.

chunks.en: I usually get to work around nine o'clock.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい9時ごろに職場に着きます。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is turn on my computer.
chunks.ja: 最初にすることはパソコンの電源を入れることです。

chunks.en: After that, I check my email and my chat messages.
chunks.ja: そのあと、メールとチャットのメッセージを確認します。

chunks.en: I always say hello to my team members.
chunks.ja: 私はいつもチームのメンバーに挨拶します。

chunks.en: In the morning, I usually feel calm and ready.
chunks.ja: 朝はたいてい落ち着いていて、準備ができた気分です。

chunks.en: Sometimes I feel a little sleepy, so I drink coffee.
chunks.ja: 時々少し眠いので、コーヒーを飲みます。

chunks.en: That's how I start my day at work.
chunks.ja: そんなふうに私は職場での一日を始めます。

outline: Point 1: first tasks at my desk
Point 2: greeting the team and morning mood
Wrap-up: how I start my day

modelTalk.text: I get to work at nine most days. I take the same bus every morning. Sometimes I'm a little late, but not often. I like to arrive early. When I get to my desk, I sit down first. Then I turn on my computer. I check my emails and my plans for the day. I say hello to my friends near me. I always smile at my boss too. In the morning I feel calm and ready. Some days I'm tired, but coffee helps a lot. I drink it slowly and I wake up. Then I start my work. It's a good way to begin my day.
